productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Check Lae Blue Shirts
description: CompositionBlue check full sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has white and grey accents, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest  with embroidered brand name over it, full length buttoned placket, sleeves with buttoned cuffs and button on the elbow, and has a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  blue check shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The long sleeves can be rolled up and buttoned at the elbow for a casual look. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
